recipes.name: Korean Garlic Buns
ingredients: 16 King's Hawaiian Original Hawaiian Sweet Rolls
2-3 tablespoon sweetened condensed milk, to taste
2 tbsp grated or shredded parmesan cheese
recipes.notes: I just use any soft buns but my favorite to use are potato buns. Normally, I omit the sweetened condensed milk from the garlic butter custard because I don't like to make it too sweet. I keep it in the cream cheese filling though! I add a lot of parmesan cheese to the garlic butter custard and for the topping, I add a bunch of any other cheese e.g. mozzarella.

recipes.name: Matcha Tiramisu
ingredients: Matcha + water + sugar dipping the lady fingers in
recipes.notes: I just got matcha without ice from a cafe to dip the lady fingers in. Leave it overnight for the creamiest tiramisu ever! I always double the batch if there are 6+ people who will eat it (or if you just need it to last more days :) ).

recipes.name: Classic Tiramisu
recipes.notes: Leave it overnight for the creamiest tiramisu ever! I always double the batch if there are 6+ people who will eat it (or if you just need it to last more days :) ). I always use americano for dipping in the lady fingers (you can also use instant coffee but fresh always gives better results). I add a dash of vanilla into the coffee too.

recipes.name: Sweet Potato Cake
ingredients: 2/3 cup olive oil, plus more for oiling baking dish
1 cup blended sweet potato from 1 large potato
recipes.notes: I always add cocoa powder into the recipe for a chocolate version. One of my mom’s favorite cakes so if you have a health conscious mom you should make it for her!

recipes.name: Strawberries & Cream Cake
recipes.notes: I have made this a hundred times for friends and family and it never misses!

recipes.name: Spicy Red Pasta
recipes.notes: I always add some more cheeky seasonings (etc. garlic powder, onion powder).

recipes.name: Caesar Salad Sauce
recipes.notes: I skip out on the anchovies mostly when making this but I do think they will elevate the flavor. The veggies are totally according to preference but my favorite is just lettuce and sometimes carrot. Always season some cut up bread and pop it in the oven/airfryer for croutons. My mom always just grills chicken in the oven to pair with this and it's the perfect meal.

recipes.name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipes.notes: Adding cut up dark chocolate bar along with the chocolate chips + seasalt makes all the difference!!

recipes.name: Pretzels
ingredients: 2 1/4 cups all-purpose flour plus more for kneading
1 Tbsp pretzel salt or coarse grind salt
recipes.notes: Literally no notes! Been making these for 6 years now and they are fluffy every time.

recipes.name: Cream Cheese Frosting
recipes.notes: Best paired with red velvet cake!

recipes.name: Ranch
ingredients: 1:1 ratio of mayonnaise and sour cream
recipes.notes: Recipe starts at 0.30s of the video. I always add lemon juice even though it's not in this recipe. For the leafy element (chives, dried dill) you can replace or build up with: green onion, parsley, fresh chives or fresh dill.

recipes.name: Spicy Potato
ingredients: A spoon of tomato paste or pepper paste
recipes.notes: You can use pepper paste you get from fresh sections in supermarkets or you can use tomato paste that is available in bottles/boxes.

recipes.name: Baked Oats
ingredients: Optional - 1 tbsp sweetener of choice (honey, maple syrup, coconut sugar, brown sugar)
recipes.notes: I normally just add in the entire banana.

recipes.name: Turkish Pasta
ingredients: Pasta of your choice (shell shaped used)
Salt, pepper and MSG to taste
recipes.notes: Super easy to prep and sooo rewarding!!
